evidence.title: Arab Times May 23 report on Iran CAA western Tehran FIR restrictions
evidence.source_description: Arab Times article captured in argument phase; reports Iran CAA NOTAM temporary closure of all airports in western Tehran FIR except limited daylight operations.
evidence.relevance: Corroborates Iranian CAA attribution, May 22-May 25 timing, limited airport exceptions, suspension of prior permissions, fresh approval requirement, and security/non-weather context.

evidence.title: Indian Express May 23 report on Iran western airspace closure
evidence.source_description: Indian Express article captured in argument phase; reports Iranian CAA NOTAM OIIX A1010/26, operational airports, daylight restrictions, fresh approval requirement, and security/diplomatic context.
evidence.relevance: Credible reporting corroborating the NOTAM, CAA attribution, affected airports including listed market airports, operational limits, timing, and non-weather/security context.

evidence.title: Notamify capture of OIIX A1010/26 raw NOTAM
evidence.source_description: Notamify OIIX NOTAM page captured in argument phase; page text includes interpretation and raw NOTAM A1010/26.
evidence.relevance: Primary-like NOTAM text for Iran/Tehran FIR airport closure effective May 22-May 25, 2026; proves scope, timing, exceptions, CAA permission requirement, and non-weather aviation restriction source chain.

evidence.title: Notamify capture of OIIX A1015/26 superseding NOTAM
evidence.source_description: Notamify OIIX NOTAM page captured in argument phase; page text includes interpretation and raw NOTAM A1015/26 replacing A1010/26.
evidence.relevance: Shows the closure remained in force past the May 24 ET deadline after A1015/26 replaced A1010/26, with expanded exception list and continued CAA permission requirement.
